glosses.ja: 現代的な; モダンな

sentences.target: Mi móvil es moderno y rápido.

translations.es: Mi móvil es moderno y rápido.
translations.en: My phone is modern and fast.
translations.fr: Mon téléphone est moderne et rapide.
translations.de: Mein Handy ist modern und schnell.
translations.it: Il mio telefono è moderno e veloce.
translations.zh-Hans: 我的手机很现代，也很快。
translations.yue: 我部手機好新潮又好快。
translations.pt: O meu telemóvel é moderno e rápido.
translations.vi: Điện thoại của tôi hiện đại và nhanh.
translations.nl: Mijn telefoon is modern en snel.
translations.hi: मेरा फोन आधुनिक और तेज़ है।
translations.pl: Mój telefon jest nowoczesny i szybki.
translations.el: Το κινητό μου είναι μοντέρνο και γρήγορο.
translations.nb: Mobilen min er moderne og rask.
translations.sv: Min mobil är modern och snabb.
translations.ro: Telefonul meu este modern și rapid.
translations.cs: Můj telefon je moderní a rychlý.
translations.da: Min telefon er moderne og hurtig.
translations.ja: 私の携帯電話はモダンで速いです。

tokens.explanation: Determiner of possession; agrees in person/number semantics with the possessor and modifies the noun.
Common noun, singular masculine; head of the noun phrase.
Copular auxiliary verb linking the subject with the predicative adjective.
Adjective functioning as a subject complement; masculine singular to agree with 'móvil'.
Coordinating conjunction connecting two adjectives.
Adjective coordinated with 'moderno'; masculine singular, predicative complement.

sentences.target: Ese café tiene un aire moderno.

translations.es: Ese café tiene un aire moderno.
translations.en: That café has a modern feel.
translations.fr: Ce café a une ambiance moderne.
translations.de: Dieses Café hat eine moderne Atmosphäre.
translations.yue: 嗰間咖啡店有種好新潮嘅感覺。
translations.pt: Esse café tem um ar moderno.
translations.he: לאותו בית קפה יש אווירה מודרנית.
translations.tr: O kafenin modern bir havası var.
translations.vi: Quán cà phê đó có không khí hiện đại.
translations.nl: Dat café heeft een moderne sfeer.
translations.hu: Annak a kávézónak modern hangulata van.
translations.hi: उस कैफ़े में आधुनिक माहौल है।
translations.el: Αυτό το καφέ έχει μοντέρνα ατμόσφαιρα.
translations.nb: Den kafeen har en moderne atmosfære.
translations.sv: Det kaféet har en modern känsla.
translations.ro: Acea cafenea are o atmosferă modernă.
translations.da: Den café har en moderne stemning.
translations.ja: あのカフェはモダンな雰囲気です。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner modifying the noun; masculine singular.
Common noun, singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Indefinite article modifying the noun; masculine singular.
Common noun, singular masculine; direct object within the phrase.
Adjective modifying 'aire'; masculine singular agreement.

translations.en: I bought a modern watch yesterday.
translations.fr: J’ai acheté une montre moderne hier.
translations.de: Ich habe gestern eine moderne Uhr gekauft.
translations.it: Ho comprato un orologio moderno ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 我昨天买了一块现代的手表。
translations.yue: 我噚日買咗隻好新潮嘅錶。
translations.vi: Hôm qua tôi đã mua một chiếc đồng hồ hiện đại.
translations.nl: Ik heb gisteren een modern horloge gekocht.
translations.hi: मैंने कल एक आधुनिक घड़ी खरीदी।
translations.nb: Jeg kjøpte en moderne klokke i går.
translations.id: Saya membeli jam tangan modern вчера.
translations.sv: Jag köpte en modern klocka i går.
translations.ro: Am cumpărat un ceas modern ieri.
translations.cs: Včera jsem si koupil moderní hodinky.
translations.da: Jeg købte et moderne ur i går.
translations.ja: 私は昨日、モダンな腕時計を買いました。

tokens.explanation: Main lexical verb in preterite, first person singular.
Indefinite article modifying the noun; masculine singular.
Common noun, singular masculine; direct object of the verb.
Adjective modifying 'reloj'; masculine singular agreement.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Tu cuarto parece moderno y limpio.

translations.es: Tu cuarto parece moderno y limpio.
translations.en: Your room looks modern and clean.
translations.fr: Ta chambre a l’air moderne et propre.
translations.de: Dein Zimmer sieht modern und sauber aus.
translations.it: La tua stanza sembra moderna e pulita.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的房间看起来现代又干净。
translations.yue: 你間房睇落好新潮又乾淨。
translations.ru: Твоя комната выглядит современной и чистой.
translations.pt: O teu quarto parece moderno e limpo.
translations.vi: Phòng của bạn trông hiện đại và sạch sẽ.
translations.nl: Je kamer ziet er modern en schoon uit.
translations.uk: Твоя кімната виглядає сучасною і чистою.
translations.hu: A szobád modernnek és tisztának tűnik.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा कमरा आधुनिक और साफ़ दिखता है।
translations.pl: Twój pokój wygląda nowocześnie i czysto.
translations.el: Το δωμάτιό σου φαίνεται μοντέρνο και καθαρό.
translations.nb: Rommet ditt ser moderne og rent ut.
translations.id: Kamar kamu terlihat modern dan bersih.
translations.sv: Ditt rum ser modernt och rent ut.
translations.ro: Camera ta arată modernă și curată.
translations.cs: Tvůj pokoj vypadá moderně a čistě.
translations.da: Dit værelse ser moderne og rent ud.
translations.ja: あなたの部屋はモダンで清潔に見えます。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying the noun; singular form, invariant for gender.
Common noun, singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Main lexical verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Adjective functioning as a predicative complement of 'parece'; masculine singular.
Coordinating conjunction connecting two adjectives.
Adjective coordinated with 'moderno'; masculine singular predicative complement.
